description: Apply FIFO, LIFO, and weighted-average cost-flow methods to compute COGS and ending inventory, convert LIFO to FIFO, and evaluate the impact on ratios and valuation

fields.name: purchases
fields.label: Period purchases with quantity and unit cost

cost_flow_methods.fifo: First-in, first-out — COGS reflects oldest costs, ending inventory reflects newest
cost_flow_methods.lifo: Last-in, first-out — COGS reflects newest costs, ending inventory reflects oldest (US GAAP only)
cost_flow_methods.weighted_average: Average cost per unit applied to COGS and ending inventory
cost_flow_methods.specific_identification: Used for unique items (vehicles, real estate)

inflation_effects.rising_prices_fifo: Higher ending inventory, lower COGS, higher gross profit and taxes
inflation_effects.rising_prices_lifo: Lower ending inventory, higher COGS, lower gross profit and taxes
inflation_effects.lifo_liquidation: Selling below production -> old low costs flow through, inflating margins

conversion.cogs_to_fifo: LIFO COGS - change in LIFO reserve

valuation_adjustments.ifrs: Lower of cost or net realisable value (NRV)
valuation_adjustments.us_gaap: Lower of cost or NRV (for FIFO and WA); lower of cost or market (LIFO)
valuation_adjustments.reversals: IFRS allows reversal; US GAAP does not

ratio_impact.inventory_turnover: LIFO firms show higher turnover (lower inventory)
ratio_impact.gross_margin: FIFO firms show higher margins in inflation

compute_cogs_inventory.description: Compute COGS and ending inventory under chosen method

errors.message: method must be fifo, lifo, weighted_average, or specific_identification

anti_patterns.rule: Do not compare LIFO US firms against FIFO IFRS firms without adjustment
anti_patterns.why: Use LIFO reserve to restate to FIFO; otherwise ratios and margins are not comparable

anti_patterns.rule: Do not ignore LIFO liquidation gains
anti_patterns.why: Selling old, low-cost inventory inflates gross profit temporarily; strip from sustainable earnings

anti_patterns.rule: Do not carry inventory above NRV
anti_patterns.why: IFRS and US GAAP both require write-down; failing to do so overstates assets and future margins

anti_patterns.rule: Do not treat inventory turnover in isolation
anti_patterns.why: High turnover can reflect stockouts and lost sales; pair with gross margin and sales growth
